items.title: Norms and Euclidean distance
items.description: L2 distance sums squared coordinate differences; if one feature has values 1000× larger than another, distance mostly measures that column. Norms explain the geometry; this topic supplies the rescaling step before distance-based learning.

items.title: Feature engineering workflows
items.description: Engineering may log-transform skewed columns or build custom scalers per domain before modeling; this topic owns the default StandardScaler/MinMax recipes and when they belong in the pipeline.

items.title: k-nearest neighbors
items.description: k-NN ranks neighbors by distance; without scaling, the feature with the largest numeric range drives every vote. Fit StandardScaler on training rows before fitting or querying neighbors.

items.title: Ridge and Lasso regularization
items.description: L1/L2 penalties treat coefficients equally only when inputs share comparable variance; StandardScaler before Ridge or Lasso makes the penalty align with predictive contribution rather than raw units.

items.title: Z-scores and outlier detection
items.description: StandardScaler applies the same (x − μ)/σ transform used in z-score outlier rules; detection thresholds and modeling scalers both require train-only statistics to avoid leakage.
